text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, I head over to the training track...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Huff... Phew... How was my time?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Perfection! And talk about form! Hey, you! Wasn't
she amazing?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: I'm guessin' that hot spring trip really paid off.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, we went to a hot spring the other day, just
the two of us...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Mmm... That water felt sooo good...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
But how come you invited me to the hot spring all
of a sudden?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
You've been working yourself to the bone lately,
so I figured washing your fatigue away would do
you some good.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
It's nice to get away from the daily grind every
once in a while, y'know?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Palmer... Ehehe, thanks!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I booked us in for a beauty treatment after this
too! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
B-beauty treatment?! Uh, that's not really my
thing!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
C'mon, just give it a try! It's not every day that
you can get the full spa experience!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Sure, it might be important to focus, but you
need to escape sometimes too, you know.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha... I wasn't expecting a beauty treatment,
but I think my muscles are looking way shinier
now.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Come to think of it, that manga you were reading
the other day had a scene where that couple ran
away to a hot spring too, right?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! It was so swoon-worthy! The way they held
hands as they walked along the mountain path...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
...Wait. How do you know about my favorite
manga?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Well, 'cause I like that comic too! ♪ A romantic
getaway sounds so dreamy. Like lovers on the
run...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: L-l-lovers?! What are you talking about, Palmer?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: C'mon, don't be like that! Lemme explain.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Y'know how characters in manga always tell each
other how they feel when they run off to
somewhere unfamiliar?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
That means their runaway romance is what saves
the day!
choice_data_list:
Maybe it's true that unfamiliar experiences help
you grow.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
That means their runaway romance is what saves
the day!
choice_data_list:
Maybe it's true that unfamiliar experiences help
you grow.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, you escaped your grueling training routine
by running off to the hot spring, and that helped
you give your muscles some TLC, yeah?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Your muscles are always taking good care of you,
right? And this trip helped you express your love
for 'em, didn't it?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Yeah... You're right! I haven't been showing my muscles enough love and care lately!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: I've been in such a rush to workout that I've been pushing them too hard... I guess I never thought about how they felt.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Thank you, Palmer! You've really opened my eyes
to something super important!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Uh-huh! Glad to help. And don't forget to give
your muscles more runaway romance! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I mean, training is kinda like escaping from
everyday life anyway, so...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I get it! So the hot spring and beauty
treatment were a form of training to help
strengthen my mind!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Thanks, Palmer! I'm gonna go hit the showers and
ice up my muscles like a monk standing under a
waterfall!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Nice! I'd expect nothing less from a muscle
maniac like you. A waterfall escape... Now that
sounds refreshing. ♪
